description: Each Package comes with totally 2 Pieces. Each Bow measures 5.5 inch 20 Loop. Large organza pull bow gift wrapping pull bows are perfect to use for embellishment, decorating gifts, weddings, bride and grooms cars, Christmas decoration Color: Lime Green Color total of 2 Pieces are available . Assembly/Use: Hold one end, find and hold the two small inside ribbons from the other end and then pull them to make the flower. It just takes a second to make a beautiful bow for gifts. These Bows shipped flat for easy storage.
